channel.title: Olap on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Olap on Pi Stack

item.title: DuckDB vs Apache Doris vs Apache Pinot: Best Self-Hosted OLAP Databases 2026
item.description: When you need fast analytical queries over large datasets, choosing the right OLAP (Online Analytical Processing) database is critical. In 2026, three open-source options stand out for different use cases: DuckDB for embedded, single-node analytics; Apache Doris for high-performance distributed data warehousing; and Apache Pinot for real-time analytics at scale.
